phase_a4.gate: A2 passed, so A4 must run.
phase_a4.decision_rule: Choose norm-free only if its final post-fold OpenWebText eval loss is below the preregistered BandNorm-only comparator of 3.3180; otherwise use BandNorm.

phase_c.runner_behavior: Preserves protocol-v1 through v3 artifacts. Protocol v4 permanently demotes all 768 previously evaluated prompts to development data, evaluates every available v2/v3 threshold circuit, and among exact candidates maximizes worst-case signed correct-token margin before minimizing edges and threshold. If no candidate is exact, C2 reruns only for that task on 768 rows. The next 512 generator rows are a hash-locked, balanced final gate opened only after selection. C3 resynthesizes on all 768 development rows before the one-shot final gate, then proceeds to core-aware healing only if exactness holds.
phase_c.protocol_v2_result: The selected bracket_type circuit was exact on 256 v2 synthesis rows and scored 247/256 on the untouched v2 gate; the run stopped before joint program selection or healing.
phase_c.protocol_v3_result: The selected bracket_type circuit was exact on all 512 v3 development rows and scored 255/256 on the untouched v3 gate; the full model and quote circuit remained exact, and the run stopped before joint program selection or healing.
phase_c.protocol_v4_result: Both selected circuits were exact on all 768 development rows. On the final untouched 512-row gate, the full model was exact on both tasks, the bracket_type circuit was exact at 512/512, and the quote_close circuit scored 511/512 (single 256/256; double 255/256). The base-full-and-circuit preflight failed before any program selection or filtering, so the exact-generalization track stopped with no protocol v5.
phase_c.reference_target: explicit reference program P(x), not cached base decisions; the runner separately requires the base decisions to equal P(x)
phase_c.joint_program_gate: Required full and circuit-only exactness on both tasks. The v4 run failed the base-full-and-circuit preflight because quote_close circuit accuracy was 511/512 on the final gate; selection_or_filtering_performed was false.
phase_c.final_gate_stop_policy: No protocol v5. If the v4 gate fails, stop the exact-generalization track, report measured per-task and per-stratum agreement as near-exact faithfulness, scope claims accordingly, and do not select another circuit against the gate.
phase_c.program_synthesis_status: Candidate programs were synthesized on the 768-row development domain, but no joint subset was selected, filtered, installed, or evaluated because the base circuit preflight failed.
phase_c.core_aware_gate: Exact P(x) accuracy on both gate tasks, perplexity <= 28.617593822841776, minimum rotating suppression coverage, exact circuit-only P(x) accuracy, every installed circuit program individually necessary in full and core forwards, and joint program removal non-bypassed in full and core forwards.

phase_c_bounded_continuation.relationship_to_v4: The protocol-v4 held-out-generalization track remains stopped. This is a separate bounded-domain claim over the frozen union of all 1,280 previously evaluated prompts per task.
phase_c_bounded_continuation.quote_policy: Re-extract on all 1,280 prompts; select the minimum-edge exact circuit; synthesize on the same D; require every retained attention head to be replaced for the flagship zero-bilinear claim.
phase_c_bounded_continuation.behavioral_gate: Full and circuit-only accuracy against P(x) must both equal 1.0 on every row of D before and after healing.
phase_c_bounded_continuation.migration_gate: Every installed program is individually necessary in full and circuit-only forwards, and joint removal is non-bypassed.
phase_c_bounded_continuation.formal_verification_scope: SMT properties use separately declared bounded token-sequence domains; exhaustive behavior on D and SMT properties are reported as distinct measurements.
phase_c_bounded_continuation.bracket_policy: Deferred stretch goal. The existing 340-edge circuit is exact on D; any partial replacement must report remaining neural heads and bilinear terms.

kill_and_fallback_criteria.a4_removal_failure: Use BandNorm and skip norm-free as the C base.
kill_and_fallback_criteria.c3_partial_fit: Retain resistant heads as neural, then require the selected replacement set to pass joint synthesis and untouched-gate checks before healing.
kill_and_fallback_criteria.c3_joint_failure: On the final v4 gate, stop before healing, preserve per-task and per-stratum results, and do not create protocol v5 or adapt selection to the gate.
kill_and_fallback_criteria.c5_migration_failure: Stop and preserve the core-aware model and complete lesion report; do not claim migration success from circuit inclusion alone.
kill_and_fallback_criteria.c6_solver_limit: Record the largest proven length and all timeout/unknown outcomes without moving the goalpost.
